creator: jreed@isc.org
text:
I have been maintaining a BIND 10 port for a couple years. (See earlier closed ticket http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=164761 )

My various port work is at http://git.bind10.isc.org/~jreed/freebsd/
and the latest is http://git.bind10.isc.org/~jreed/freebsd/ports-bind10-1.0.0.tgz
